  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The review should assess whether the section clearly frames the thesis and contribution claims (e.g., unified evaluation framework, deployment-gap metric) at a conceptual level.",
    "R1.2": "The review should check the internal coherence of the problem setup, two-level control description, objectives, and constraints as an argument chain.",
    "R1.5": "The review should evaluate whether the ordering from problem statement to contribution to modeling/abstraction choices supports a clear narrative arc.",
    "R1.6": "The review should address sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, precision, and concision for readability.",
    "RX.1": "The review should explicitly note uncertainties or assumptions given the limited context of a single section.",
    "RX.2": "The review should avoid overstating judgments about performance or novelty that are not evidenced within this section.",
    "RX.3": "The review should remain scoped strictly to this section without inferring details about experiments or broader paper content.",
    "RX.4": "The review should avoid recommendations that could encourage misleading or unsafe claims about grid operations or commitments.",
    "RX.5": "The review should tie comments to specific statements or constructs from the provided excerpt for traceability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The review should assess whether the section clearly frames the thesis and contribution claims (e.g., unified evaluation framework, deployment-gap metric) at a conceptual level.
rationale.R1.2: The review should check the internal coherence of the problem setup, two-level control description, objectives, and constraints as an argument chain.
rationale.R1.5: The review should evaluate whether the ordering from problem statement to contribution to modeling/abstraction choices supports a clear narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: The review should address sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, precision, and concision for readability.
rationale.RX.1: The review should explicitly note uncertainties or assumptions given the limited context of a single section.
rationale.RX.2: The review should avoid overstating judgments about performance or novelty that are not evidenced within this section.
rationale.RX.3: The review should remain scoped strictly to this section without inferring details about experiments or broader paper content.
rationale.RX.4: The review should avoid recommendations that could encourage misleading or unsafe claims about grid operations or commitments.
rationale.RX.5: The review should tie comments to specific statements or constructs from the provided excerpt for traceability.
